name: RunSettings
summary: The RunSettings object contains properties which control how execution is carried out.

constructors.name: RunSettings()
constructors.summary: This method creates default RunSettings with DefaultRunPeriod, Manual run type and run is enabled.

constructors.name: RunSettings(Dynamo.Models.RunType, int)
constructors.summary: This function creates RunSettings with specified run type and run period.

properties.name: RunEnabled
properties.summary: A flag which indicates whether running a graph is possible. If set to true, Dynamo will allow graphs to be run (except if the corresponding dyn file is not trusted) If set to false, Dynamo will not allow graphs to be run. The Dynamo UI will reflect the RunEnabled values by enabling/disabling certain UI features (ex. if RunEnabled is false, the Run button will be disabled).

properties.name: RunPeriod
properties.summary: The length, in milliseconds, of the period between requests to execute.

properties.name: RunType
properties.summary: Returns or sets the current Run Type. E.g. Manual, Automatic, Periodic

properties.name: RunTypesEnabled
properties.summary: This property will enable or disable the ComboBox RunTypes
